work_unit: full deep audit — scripts/ + script-verifier/ + topic-pool/
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after personal-assistant audit-021 fixes resolved. Triggered new full deep-audit per event-driven protocol. Selected wechat-main as next unaudited project (not in audit history, 306 files, active production pipeline for WeChat public account content).
action: Ran 4 parallel sonnet sub-agents to deep-audit: (1) push modules mail_push.py+qq_push.py, (2) search+LLM modules bocha/brave/bing_search.py+deepseek_refine.py, (3) pipeline+verifier pipeline.py+pipeline-gate.sh+verifier.py+claim_extractor.py+fact_checker.py+hot-scanner.py, (4) data modules knowledge_base/research_cache/feedback_collector/persona_drift/style_*/structural_*/ending_detector/title_scorer/competitor_analyzer/predictive_scanner/metrics_panel/multi_platform/daily_report/style_evolution/check_outline. Synthesized findings into audit report.
outcome_evidence: Audit report written to .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-06-022.md with 31 findings (5H/17M/9L). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, current_audit_id=audit-2026-07-06-022, 22 derived_fixes registered as pending. No code modified this round (audit-only per protocol).
next_suggestion: Dispatch H-001 (research_cache.py slug path traversal) as first derived fix — highest severity, smallest scope (1 file, regex validation)
Then H-002 (pipeline.py state shell injection), H-003 (bing_search SSRF), H-004 (fact_checker search-poisoning), H-005 (qq_push .env permission)
Batch medium findings by category: M-001+M-002 size caps, M-003+M-004 exception sanitization, M-005+M-006+M-007 resp.read caps, M-013+M-014 flock additions

audit_findings.finding: slug path traversal — unsanitized CLI arg in f-string path construction enables R/W arbitrary files
audit_findings.remediation: Validate slug against re.fullmatch(r'[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]{0,63}', slug)

audit_findings.finding: Shell injection via state['min_bytes'] f-string interpolation into shell command prefix
audit_findings.remediation: Pass WECHAT_MIN_BYTES via subprocess env dict instead of shell prefix; int-cast before interpolation

audit_findings.finding: SSRF via _fetch_page_text fetching arbitrary URLs from SERP without protocol/IP validation
audit_findings.remediation: Allow only http/https; block private IP ranges; re-validate after redirect resolution

audit_findings.finding: Empty search results auto-FALSIFIED for high-risk claims enables search-poisoning DoS
audit_findings.remediation: Treat empty as UNVERIFIABLE with needs_claude_review=True; require affirmative contradiction for FALSIFIED

audit_findings.finding: Hardcoded /opt/wanxia/.env path with no permission check — ClientSecret leak if world-readable
audit_findings.remediation: Stat-check file mode on load; reject if not 0o600/0o400; prefer env var fallback

audit_findings.finding: HTML attachment unbounded read_bytes() — OOM on abnormal file size
audit_findings.remediation: Check st_size; cap at 10MB

audit_findings.finding: Upload file unbounded read + multipart body in memory — double memory usage OOM
audit_findings.remediation: Cap at 20MB QQ Bot limit

audit_findings.finding: Token response dict serialized in exception message leaks internals
audit_findings.remediation: Extract only error/error_description truncated

audit_findings.finding: Upload response dict serialized in exception message leaks internals
audit_findings.remediation: Same as above

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded resp.read() from Bocha API — OOM on malicious endpoint
audit_findings.remediation: resp.read(5_000_000)

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded resp.read() from Brave API — OOM on malicious endpoint
audit_findings.remediation: resp.read(5_000_000)

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded resp.read() from DeepSeek API — OOM on misbehaving endpoint
audit_findings.remediation: resp.read(1_000_000)

audit_findings.finding: Prompt injection via raw_summary concatenated directly into LLM user message without delimiter fencing
audit_findings.remediation: Wrap in <search_results> XML tags; add system prompt instruction for untrusted data boundary

audit_findings.finding: State file non-atomic write — concurrent pipeline invocations corrupt state
audit_findings.remediation: Temp file + os.replace()

audit_findings.finding: State loading no schema validation — malicious state can hijack phase flow or inject commands
audit_findings.remediation: Validate required keys, step id format, phase values against whitelist

audit_findings.finding: TOPIC parameter unsanitized in find -name glob — path traversal via crafted topic slug
audit_findings.remediation: Reject TOPIC containing /, .., or glob metacharacters

audit_findings.finding: --output CLI arg writes to arbitrary path without restriction
audit_findings.remediation: Validate resolved path under project root

audit_findings.finding: JSONL append without fcntl.flock — torn-line reads under concurrency
audit_findings.remediation: Add LOCK_EX around write, LOCK_SH around read

audit_findings.finding: JSONL append without flock — same as feedback_collector
audit_findings.remediation: Add LOCK_EX/LOCK_SH

audit_findings.finding: Non-atomic evolve_suggestion.json write
audit_findings.remediation: Temp file + os.replace()

audit_findings.finding: --output path not validated + non-atomic HTML write
audit_findings.remediation: Restrict to output dir + atomic write

audit_findings.finding: Topic pool merge TOCTOU race + no schema validation on existing entries
audit_findings.remediation: Atomic write + schema validation on merge

audit_findings.finding: Full recipient email logged to stderr — PII on disk via cron redirect
audit_findings.remediation: Mask email before logging

audit_findings.finding: _api urlopen r.read() no size cap
Full os.environ copied to gate subprocess — credential leakage to child processes
audit_findings.remediation: Construct minimal env with PATH + needed vars only

audit_findings.finding: Dangerous-char blocklist incomplete (misses newline, redirect, $VAR) — false assurance
audit_findings.remediation: Document as advisory-only since subprocess.run list form is already safe

audit_findings.finding: Symlink following in checker invocation via find output
audit_findings.remediation: Add -not -type l to find; realpath validation

audit_findings.finding: qa_falsified_count grep fallback fragile — narrative text can match before actual count
audit_findings.remediation: For .json exclusively use python parser; anchor .md regex tighter

audit_findings.finding: User-supplied article path not canonicalized — symlink could exfil content into KB
audit_findings.remediation: .resolve() + directory containment check

audit_findings.finding: script_path from sys.argv opened without path restriction — arbitrary file read
audit_findings.remediation: Validate within project + .md extension

audit_findings.finding: Substring corroboration ≥50% entity match triggers false VERIFIED on generic tokens
audit_findings.remediation: Require proximity window co-occurrence; increase threshold for short/generic claims
